messages.content: You are a React expert. Generate a complete Tetris game as a single React component. Output only code in a markdown code block.

Create a Tetris game in React. Requirements: 10x20 grid, 7 tetrominos (I,O,T,S,Z,J,L), keyboard controls (arrows, space), score system, next piece preview, game over detection. Use useState, useEffect, useCallback. Use dark theme with colorful blocks. Output only code in a ```tsx code block.
